name: find-docs
description: Retrieve up-to-date library/framework documentation via Context7 — API patterns, setup guides, migration docs.

prerequisites.name: npx
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (npx is bundled with npm)

methods.name: npx
methods.command: echo 'find-docs uses npx ctx7@latest — no global install needed'

install.notes: Uses npx ctx7@latest at runtime — no global installation required.

post_install_hints: For higher rate limits, set up Context7 authentication:
Option B: npx ctx7@latest login  (browser-based OAuth)
Get an API key at: https://context7.com/
